mapper.select: select sum(JANUARY) as JANUARY, sum(FEBRUARY) as FEBRUARY, sum(MARCH) as MARCH, sum(APRIL) as APRIL, sum(MAY) as MAY, sum(JUNE) as JUNE, sum(JULY) as JULY, sum(AUGUST) as AUGUST, sum(SEPTEMBER) as SEPTEMBER, sum(OCTOBER) as OCTOBER, sum(NOVEMBER) as NOVEMBER, sum(DECEMBER) as DECEMBER from YEAR_WATER_USE_PLAN_TRUNK_CANAL where year = #{year} and use_water_plan = #{useWaterPlan} and area like concat ('%',#{area},'%')
